title: Yijing Hexagram 22: Bi (Grace)
description: Hexagram 22 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 22 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Grace has success. In small matters it is favorable to undertake something. Fire at the foot of the mountain.
